revision.text:
[[ja:出早比売命]] {{Infobox deity | name = Itsuhayahime-no-Mikoto | kami_type = {{ill|Kunitsukami|ja|国津神|1=Kunitsukami|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kunitsukami|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天津神・国津神|comment=confirming this goes to Kunitsukami|1=Kunitsukami|2=zh|3=國神|4=fr|5=Kunitsukami|6=mni|7=ꯀꯨꯅꯤꯠꯁꯨꯀꯃꯤ}} | full_name = Itsuhayahime-no-Mikoto | other_names = {{ill|Aizuhime-no-Kami|ja|会津比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aizuhime-no-Kami|1=Aizu-hime-no-Kami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q56350355}}, {{ill|Itsuhayahime-no-Mikoto|lt=Itsuhayahime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ishihayahime-no-Mikoto|ja|伊志波夜比売命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishihayahime-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, Itsuhayahime-no-Mikoto, {{ill|Itsuhayahime-no-Mikoto|lt=Itsuhayahime-no-Mikoto|lt=Izuhayahime-no-Mikoto|ja|出速姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayahime-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} | alternate_names = | Rank = | attributes = | shrine = | consort = {{ill|Takehoyotate-no-Mikoto|ja|建五百建命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takehoyotate-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 武五百建命|1=Take Momotake no Mikoto|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q87863507}}?, {{ill|Ame no Murakumo|ja|天村雲命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Murakumo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天押雲根命}}? | offspring = {{ill|Takehoyotate-no-Mikoto|ja|健稲背命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeine-se-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}? | related_clans = {{ill|Shinano Kuni no Miyatsuko|ja|科野国造|1=Shinano no Kuni no Miyatsuko|lt=Shina no Kuni no Miyatsuko|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinano Kuni no Miyatsuko|13=User:Immanuelle/Shina no Kuni no Miyatsuko|qq=}} ({{ill|Kanasashi clan|ja|金刺氏|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanasashi clan|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 金刺部氏|1=Kanasashi clan|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11646498}}) }} '''Itsuhayahime-no-Mikoto''' (伊都速比売命) is a {{ill|Goddess|en|Goddess|qid=Q205985|lt=goddess|1=Goddess}} from the {{ill|Suwa Shrine|lt=Suwa Shrine|lt=Suwa faith|ja|諏訪信仰|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa faith|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪神社}} in the {{ill|Suwa Region|lt=Suwa Region|lt=Suwa region|ja|諏訪地方|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suwa region|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 諏訪地域}} of present-day {{ill|Nagano Prefecture|en|Nagano Prefecture|qid=Q127877|lt=Nagano Prefecture|1=Nagano Prefecture}}. == Overview == Itsuhayahime-no-Mikoto, also written as Izuhayahime-no-Mikoto, is considered synonymous with {{ill|Aizuhime-no-Kami|ja|会津比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Aizuhime-no-Kami|1=Aizu-hime-no-Kami|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q56350355}}.Yonekawa Kazuhiko, *Shuho Suwa-keizu* (修補諏訪氏系図), Taisho 10 (1921), p. 23. She is the daughter of {{ill|Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|ja|出早雄命|1=Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|qq=}} , one of the offspring of {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|qid=Q9150391|qid=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata|1=Takeminakata}}, and is considered a deity unique to Suwa. The deity {{ill|Itsuhayahime-no-Mikoto|lt=Itsuhayahime-no-Mikoto|lt=Ishihayahime-no-Mikoto|ja|伊志波夜比売命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ishihayahime-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}, worshipped at {{ill|Ame-no-Murakumo Ijihayahime Shrine|ja|天村雲伊自波夜比売神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Murakumo Ijihayahime Shrine|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579268|1=Ame-no-Murakumo Ijihayahime Shrine}}, a {{ill|Shikinaisha|ja|式内社|1=Shikinaisha|2=ja|3=式内社|1=Shikinaisha|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shikinaisha|13=User:Immanuelle|1=Engishiki Jinmyōchō|2=ja|3=延喜式神名帳|4=zh|5=延喜式神名帳|6=simple|7=Engishiki Jinmyocho|lt=Shikinaisha}} in the former {{ill|Awa Province (Tokushima)|en|Awa Province (Tokushima)|qid=Q907457|lt=Awa Province|1=Awa Province (Tokushima)}}, is said to be the same entity. *Dai Nihon Jinjishi* identifies her as the daughter of Izuhayao-no-Mikoto and the consort of {{ill|Ame no Murakumo|ja|天村雲命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Murakumo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天押雲根命}}.Yonekawa Kazuhiko, *Shuho Suwa-keizu*, pp. 23-24. In *Shuho Suwa-keizu*, it is concluded that Itsuhayahime-no-Mikoto and Ishihayahime-no-Mikoto are indeed the same deity. The work also discusses the possibility of her marriage being an extension of the ties between {{ill|Koshinokuni|ja|高志国|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Koshinokuni|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 越国|1=Koshi Province (Japan)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1351611}} and {{ill|Shinano Province|en|Shinano Province|qid=Q289250|lt=Shinano Province|1=Shinano Province}}. == Genealogy == [[File:Moriya Family Tree - 守矢氏系図.png|170px|thumbnail|center|{{ill|The Moriya clan|ja|守矢氏|1=Moriya clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/The Moriya clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Moriya clan|qq=}}'s first five generations
(from Moriya to Yatsukushi-no-Kami)]] She is one of the daughters of {{ill|Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|ja|出早雄命|1=Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|qq=}} , a child of {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|qid=Q9150391|qid=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata|1=Takeminakata}} and {{ill|Yasakatome|en|Yasakatome|qid=Q9150392|lt=Yasakatome-no-Kami|1=Yasakatome}}. Her mother is {{ill|Tamaru-hime|ja|多満留姫|1=Tamaru-hime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tamaru-hime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tamaru-hime|qq=}}, daughter of {{ill|Moreya|en|Moreya|qid=Q11146526|lt=Moriya|1=Moreya}}.*History of Moreya Shrine* (2017), accessed August 17, 2017. She has siblings such as {{ill|Kamohane-no-Kami|ja|可毛羽神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kamohane-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135493216|1=Kamoha no Kami}}, {{ill|Wakakihime-no-Kami|ja|若木比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakakihime-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135492776|1=Wakakihime-no-Kami}}, {{ill|Kusanai-no-Kami|ja|草奈井比売神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kusanai-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135493035|1=Kusanoi-hime}}, and {{ill|Sawaetahara-Rokurohiko-no-Kami|ja|佐和恵多良六老彦神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sawaetahara-Rokurohiko-no-Kami|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|qid=Q135579269|1=Q135579269}}. The *Dai Nihon Jinjishi* describes her as the consort of {{ill|Ame no Murakumo|ja|天村雲命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Murakumo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天押雲根命}}. == Shrines Dedicated to Her == * {{ill|Akagiyama Shrine|ja|天村雲神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Murakumo Shrine|qq=}} == Notes == {{Reflist}} == Related Articles == * {{ill|Takeminakata|en|Takeminakata|qid=Q9150391|qid=Q9150391|lt=Takeminakata|1=Takeminakata}} * {{ill|Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|ja|出早雄命|1=Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|13=User:Immanuelle/Izuhayao-no-Mikoto|qq=}} * {{ill|Tamaru-hime|ja|多満留姫|1=Tamaru-hime|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tamaru-hime|13=User:Immanuelle/Tamaru-hime|qq=}} * {{ill|Ame no Murakumo|ja|天村雲命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ame-no-Murakumo-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 天押雲根命}} {{Suwa Faith}} ==References== {{reflist}} {{Suwa Faith}} {{translated page|ja|出早比売命|version=94430856|comment=Imported full ja history}} [[ja:出早比売命]] {{wikidata link|Q48753263}} [[Category:Goddesses]] [[Category:Japanese deities]] [[Category:Kunitsukami]] [[Category:Suwa faith]] [[Category:Wikidata no short description]]
